file_contents./etc/samba/smb.conf:
[global]
   workgroup = INTERNAL
   server string = NAS-01 File Server
   server role = standalone server
   log file = /var/log/samba/log.%m
   max log size = 1000
   logging = file
   panic action = /usr/share/samba/panic-action %d
   server role = standalone server
   obey pam restrictions = yes
   unix password sync = yes
   passwd program = /usr/bin/passwd %u
   passwd chat = *Enter\snew\s*\spassword:* %n\n *Retype\snew\s*\spassword:* %n\n *password\supdated\ssuccessfully* .
   pam password change = yes
   map to guest = bad user
   usershare allow guests = yes
   # NOTE: old admin password was 'FileServ3r!' - changed 2025-08-14
   # TODO: rotate smbuser password, currently Sh@res2024! - ticket INFRA-2847
   # legacy guest password for migration: guestpass123

[public]
   comment = Public Share
   path = /srv/shares/public
   browseable = yes
   read only = no
   guest ok = yes
   create mask = 0644
   directory mask = 0755

[finance]
   comment = Finance Department
   path = /srv/shares/finance
   browseable = yes
   read only = no
   valid users = @sambashare
   create mask = 0660
   directory mask = 0770
   force group = sambashare

[engineering]
   comment = Engineering Projects
   path = /srv/shares/engineering
   browseable = yes
   read only = no
   valid users = @sambashare
   create mask = 0660
   directory mask = 0775
   force group = sambashare

[IT]
   comment = IT Department Internal
   path = /srv/shares/IT
   browseable = no
   read only = no
   valid users = smbuser
   create mask = 0660
   directory mask = 0770
   force user = smbuser
   force group = sambashare

[backups]
   comment = Backup Archive
   path = /srv/shares/backups
   browseable = no
   read only = yes
   valid users = backupbot
   write list = backupbot
   create mask = 0640
   directory mask = 0750

#!/bin/bash
# Mount remote shares for data sync
# Last updated: 2025-11-20 by smbuser

# Mount ERP share for report generation
mount -t cifs //erp-01/reports /mnt/erp-reports \
  -o username=svc_reports,password=R3ports@2024!,domain=INTERNAL

# Mount DC backup share
mount -t cifs //dc-01.internal.corp/sysvol /mnt/dc-sysvol \
  -o username=admin,password=DC@dmin2025!,domain=INTERNAL

# Mount backup server archive
mount -t cifs //backup-01/archive /mnt/backup-archive \
  -o username=backupbot,password=b@ckup123,domain=INTERNAL

echo "All shares mounted successfully."

file_contents./home/backupbot/nightly_backup.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Nightly backup script for NAS-01
# Runs via cron at 01:00 daily as root

LOG=/var/log/backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).log
echo "=== Backup started at $(date) ===" >> $LOG

# Sync all shares to backup server
rsync -avz --delete /srv/shares/ backupbot@backup-01:/mnt/nas-backup/ >> $LOG 2>&1

# Check exit code
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Backup completed successfully at $(date)" >> $LOG
else
    echo "ERROR: Backup failed at $(date)" >> $LOG
    mail -s "NAS-01 Backup FAILED" root@nas-01 < $LOG
fi

echo "=== Backup finished at $(date) ===" >> $LOG

file_contents./opt/filebrowser/docker-compose.yml:
version: '3.8'
services:
  filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser:latest
    container_name: filebrowser
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '8080:80'
    volumes:
      - /srv/shares:/srv
      - ./filebrowser.db:/database.db
    environment:
      - FB_DATABASE=/database.db
      - FB_ROOT=/srv
      - FB_BASEURL=/files
      # Default admin: admin / Fil3Br0wser!
    networks:
      - internal
networks:
  internal:
    driver: bridge

description: File server running Samba and NFS with multiple shared directories. Leaked SMB passwords in bash_history and mount scripts, FTP credentials in .netrc for offsite backup, fake credential spreadsheet backup in IT share, /etc/hosts mapping domain controllers and ERP servers, NFS exports revealing internal clients, Samba config and logs as rabbit holes.
